x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: OT entity records represent the operational technology components that AI can analyze for vulnerability patterns and security posture. Adequate entity volume enables Now Assist to surface risk insights across the OT environment.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Populate OT entities in the CMDB to enable AI-driven impact analysis.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_93f89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c00
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[OT entity records represent the operational technology components that AI can analyze for vulnerability patterns and security posture. Adequate entity volume enables Now Assist to surface risk insights across the OT environment.]]></ai_justification><check_name>OT Entity Volume</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("cmdb_ot_entity");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=100)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" OT entities",finding:c+" OT entities found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" OT entities",finding:c+" OT entities found."};
return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"0 entities",finding:"No OT entities found in CMDB."};
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>OTSM</module><number>CHK0000555</number><order/><remediation_guidance>Populate OT entities in the CMDB to enable AI-driven impact analysis.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>93f89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c00</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>OT Entity Volume</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_93f89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c00</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
